title: Implement Asset File Attachments
description: Implement the API endpoint to allow a user to upload and attach a file (e.g., an image) to a specific asset within a tick. The system must validate file size and type.
ai_instructions: Use a library like 'multer' for handling multipart/form-data. Configure it to validate file size and MIME type. The uploaded file could be stored on disk or in a cloud storage service, and a reference to it saved with the asset.
execution_steps: Add tests for the file upload endpoint 'POST /ticks/:id/assets/:asset_id/attachment'.
Test successful file upload, as well as rejection of oversized files and invalid file types.
Run tests to see them fail.
Configure multer with file filters and size limits.
Add a new handler in 'src/controllers/TimelineController.ts' that uses the multer middleware.
Implement the logic to handle the uploaded file (e.g., save its path to the asset in the database).
Run tests to verify the implementation.
Add '@trace TASK-017' to all modified files.
definition_of_done: API endpoint for attaching files to an asset is created and functional.
The system correctly validates and rejects files based on size and type limits.
A reference to the successfully uploaded file is stored with the corresponding asset.
All tests for the file attachment feature pass.
